title: Growth Gateway: Philippines National Climate Adaptation Plan 2023 to 2050
body: "This strategy document was prepared by the Growth Gateway programme team in collaboration with the Boston Consulting Group. The Philippines’ National Adaptation Plan (NAP) 2023 to 2050 sets out a comprehensive, data-driven strategy to build climate resilience across 8 main sectors. It will require coordinated action and investment to mitigate projected losses of up to £25 billion annually by 2050.  The document outlines 8 initiatives that should be implemented to meet climate challenges, and represents a foundational framework for fostering a climate-resilient and prosperous future for the nation. It serves as a call to action, urging all stakeholders to unite and chart a transformative course in the face of climate change.   Find out more about Growth Gateway.  "
